description: Enemy NPC profiles for Conan: The Hyborian Age

human.name: Human
human.description: Human enemies from civilized and barbaric lands

guards.name: Guards
guards.description: Every palace, every castle, every city has its Guards. They patrol the corridors and alleyways, clutching their weapons.

rules.name: Protect
rules.description: A Guard may use 1 Action to Protect a Character within Touch Range. For each Guard that Protects, the target gains +1 Physical Defense, up to a maximum of +3.

rules.name: Protect
rules.description: A Sergeant may use 1 Action to Protect a Character within Touch Range. For each Sergeant that Protects, the target gains +1 Physical Defense, up to a maximum of +3.

rules.name: Inspire
rules.description: Once per combat, a Guard Captain may use 2 Actions to inspire their allies. All Characters within Long Range that are allied to the Guard Captain apply a +1 Modifier to their Attacks for the remainder of the current combat.

bandits.name: Bandits
bandits.description: On the fringes of civilization, people make their living however they can. Banditry is found throughout the Thurian continent.

rules.name: Skulkers
rules.description: A Bandit applies a +1 Modifier to any Edge Checks related to hiding and stealth.

rules.name: Skulkers
rules.description: A Veteran Bandit applies a +1 Modifier to any Edge Checks related to hiding and stealth.

rules.name: Skulkers
rules.description: A Bandit Leader applies a +1 Modifier to any Edge Checks related to hiding and stealth.

picts.name: Picts
picts.description: Amidst the northern wilderness, concealed among the trees, watching and waiting, are the Picts.

rules.name: War Cry
rules.description: Once per combat, a Pict Champion may use 2 Actions to bellow a War Cry. All Picts within Long Range that are allied to the Pict Champion apply a Modifier of +1 to Attacks for the remainder of the current combat.

cultists.name: Cultists
cultists.description: There are many deities out there. Many foul, degenerate creatures from the ancient world prepared to call themselves gods.

rules.name: Blood Sacrifice
rules.description: As long as a Cultist Initiate is not Immobilized, they may take 2 Actions to sacrifice themself. The Cultist Initiate is immediately killed and either a Cultist High Priest (or a Demon summoned by one) gains 1D6 Life Points.

rules.name: Blood Sacrifice
rules.description: As long as a Cultist is not Immobilized, they may take 2 Actions to sacrifice themself. The Cultist is immediately killed and either a Cultist High Priest (or a Demon summoned by one) gains 1D6 Life Points.

rules.name: Summon Fiend
rules.description: A Cultist High Priest may cast the Summon Fiend or Summon Horror spells. In place of spending Stamina Points, the Cultist High Priest must instead sacrifice (instantly kill) 1 Cultist or Cultist Initiate per Stamina Point required by the spell.

pirates.name: Pirates
pirates.description: The sea offers a means of travel, of trade, of exploration. It opens the Thurian continent up to those prepared to risk the ever-present risk of Pirates.

rules.name: Sneaky
rules.description: A Pirate applies a +1 Modifier when determining their Initiative value.

rules.name: Sneaky
rules.description: A Pirate Mate applies a +1 Modifier when determining their Initiative value.

rules.name: Very Sneaky
rules.description: A Pirate Captain applies a +2 Modifier when determining their Initiative value.

rules.name: Stubborn
rules.description: A Pirate Captain applies a +2 Modifier to all Checks during a Contest.

barbarians.name: Barbarians
barbarians.description: Look to the gray hills of the north. The Barbarians of Cimmeria and Nordheim all possess a cold, unyielding, formidable streak.

rules.name: Barbaric Resilience
rules.description: When a Barbarian Youth is killed, they must make Grit Check (Difficulty 8). If the Check is passed, the Barbarian Youth may take their next Turn, but will drop dead immediately after.

rules.name: Barbaric Resilience
rules.description: When a Barbarian is killed, they must make Grit Check (Difficulty 8). If the Check is passed, the Barbarian may take their next Turn, but will drop dead immediately after.

rules.name: Bellow for Blood
rules.description: Once per combat, a Barbarian Chieftain may use 1 Action to Bellow for Blood. All Barbarian Youths and Barbarians within Long Range that are allied to the Barbarian Chieftain apply a +1 Modifier to their Damage rolls for the remainder of the current combat.

steppe-riders.name: Steppe Riders
steppe-riders.description: The Hyrkanians, the riders of the Vendhyan mountains, the horse-mounted nomad raiders.

rules.name: Mounted
rules.description: A Steppe Rider Youth is considered to be Mounted unless the GM deems otherwise.

rules.name: Mounted
rules.description: A Steppe Rider is considered to be Mounted unless the GM deems otherwise.

rules.name: Mounted
rules.description: A Steppe Rider Khan is considered to be Mounted unless the GM deems otherwise.

sorcerers.name: Sorcerers
sorcerers.description: Many seek power. Those who truly seek power, who crave it, are often drawn to the ways of the sorcerer.

rules.name: White Magic
rules.description: A Witch may cast the Call Beast and Favor of the Four Winds spells.

rules.name: Master of the Dead
rules.description: A Necromancer may cast the Raise Dead and Death Scream spells.

rules.name: Command the Dead
rules.description: Any Skeleton Warriors that a Necromancer commands apply a +1 Modifier to Attacks and Damage rolls.

rules.name: Demonic Darkness
rules.description: A Summoner may cast the Demonic Ward, Demonic Steed, Hellfire, and Summon Fiend spells.

rules.name: Hellish Sorcery
rules.description: A Summoner may ignore the Stamina Point cost on any spells they cast. Life Point costs must be paid as normal.

living-statues.name: Living Statues
living-statues.description: How does one protect the most valuable? Life can be infused into the limbs of statues.

undead.name: Undead
undead.description: The restless dead, risen from their graves

skeletons.name: Skeletons
skeletons.description: Death is no deterrent to duty. The bones of the ancient dead can be called upon.

rules.name: Fleshless
rules.description: Whenever a Skeleton Warrior suffers Damage from an arrow (from any kind of Bow or Crossbow), reduce the Damage suffered by half (rounding up).

rules.name: Fleshless
rules.description: Whenever a Skeleton Veteran suffers Damage from an arrow (from any kind of Bow or Crossbow), reduce the Damage suffered by half (rounding up).

rules.name: Fleshless
rules.description: Whenever a Skeleton Champion suffers Damage from an arrow (from any kind of Bow or Crossbow), reduce the Damage suffered by half (rounding up).

rules.name: Vengeful Aura
rules.description: Any Skeleton Warriors or Skeleton Veterans within Touch Range of a Skeleton Champion apply a +2 Modifier to their Attacks.

mummies.name: Mummies
mummies.description: The great nobles of Stygia and Khitai do not simply rot in the earth.

rules.name: Chilling Blast
rules.description: Once per Turn, a Mummy may use 1 Action to target a single Character with the following Sorcery Attack: (Range: Touch), 1D6 Damage; ignores target's AR.

rules.name: Chilling Blast
rules.description: Once per Turn, a Mummy Elect may use 1 Action to target a single Character with the following Sorcery Attack: (Range: Touch), 1D8 Damage; ignores target's AR.

rules.name: Chilling Wave
rules.description: Once per Turn, a Mummy King may use 1 Action to target all non-Undead Characters within Range with the following Sorcery Attack: (Range: Medium), 1D8 Damage; ignores target's AR.

ghosts.name: Ghosts
ghosts.description: Some desires last beyond death. Some fury is not obliterated by the end.

rules.name: Unsettle
rules.description: While one or more Apparitions are within Close Range, a Character that is not allied to the Apparition applies a -1 Modifier to all Checks and Attacks.

rules.name: Intangible
rules.description: An Apparition may never be the target of a Melee or Ranged Attack and only suffers Damage from Sorcery Attacks.

rules.name: Haunt
rules.description: Once per Turn, a Ghost may use 1 Action to haunt a target within Close Range. The Ghost and their target perform a Contest; the Ghost uses Wits, the target uses Grit. If the Ghost wins the Contest, the target must use all their Actions during their next Turn to Move directly away from the Ghost.

rules.name: Intangible
rules.description: A Ghost may never be the target of a Melee or Ranged Attack and only suffers Damage from Sorcery Attacks.

rules.name: Ethereal Anger
rules.description: An Enraged Ghost's Melee Attacks ignore their target's AR. Once an Enraged Ghost has inflicted at least 12 Damage during a combat, it will disappear from the combat.

rules.name: Intangible
rules.description: An Enraged Ghost may never be the target of a Melee or Ranged Attack and only suffers Damage from Sorcery Attacks.

vampires.name: Vampires
vampires.description: Those who would drink the blood of the living to sustain their lives.

rules.name: Blood Lust
rules.description: A Vampire must always use the Attack Action wherever it has a valid target to Attack.

rules.name: Decaying Bite
rules.description: If a Vampire inflicts 6 or more Damage in a single Melee Attack with its Fangs, its target must pass a Grit Check (Difficulty 10) or apply a -1 Modifier to all Checks and Attacks for the duration of the Tale.

rules.name: Blood Lust
rules.description: A Vampire Master must always use the Attack Action wherever it has a valid target to Attack.

rules.name: Create Thrall
rules.description: If a Vampire Master inflicts 7 or more Damage in a single Melee Attack with its Fangs, its target must pass a Grit Check (Difficulty 10) or begin the transformation into a vampiric thrall.

ghouls.name: Ghouls
ghouls.description: Skin a rubbery gray, pointed ears above a canine muzzle thicketed with needle-sharp teeth, ghouls are charnel creatures, scavengers, eaters of the dead.

rules.name: Grapple
rules.description: A Ghoul may use 1 of its Actions to perform a Might Contest with a target within Touch Range. If the Ghoul wins the Contest, the target may not take the Move Action during their next Turn.

rules.name: Razor Sharp
rules.description: A Ghoul Lord's Melee Attacks ignore their target's AR.

rules.name: Grapple
rules.description: A Ghoul Lord may use 1 of its Actions to perform a Might Contest with a target within Touch Range. If the Ghoul Lord wins the Contest, the target may not take the Move Action during their next Turn.

scourge-of-set.name: Scourge of Set
scourge-of-set.description: A raging swarm of heads and teeth and mindless fury, the Scourge of Set is a creature of scarcely conceivable savagery.

actions.attackNote: Must use 4 Actions for Melee Attacks if valid target in Range

rules.name: Venomous Bite
rules.description: When the Scourge of Set inflicts 3 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack, the target must pass a Grit Check (Difficulty 11) or become Poisoned.

black-ones.name: Black Ones
black-ones.description: Clearly more than mere human, the Black Ones inhabit an island somewhere out amidst the churning seas. Almost as tall as giants, their skin obsidian black, with eyes of vibrant gold.

rules.name: Throw
rules.description: If a Black One hits their target with a Melee Attack, rather than rolling for Damage, they may use an additional Action to throw their target one Range Zone. The target suffers 3 Damage, ignoring all AR.

rules.name: Throw
rules.description: If a Black One Elder hits their target with a Melee Attack, rather than rolling for Damage, they may use an additional Action to throw their target one Range Zone. The target suffers 5 Damage, ignoring all AR.

rules.name: Golden Pipes of Agony
rules.description: A Black One Ancient may use 1 of its Actions to target a single Character with the following Sorcery Attack: (Range: Medium), 1D8 Damage, ignores target's AR. In addition, the target may not take the Movement or Attack Actions during their next Turn.

deep-dwellers.name: Deep Dwellers
deep-dwellers.description: Hideous, malformed beings—a grotesque merging of fish and toad, all rubbery skin and bulging eyes. They worship their foul gods, hiding deep in the oceans.

rules.name: Aquatic
rules.description: A Deep Dweller can remain underwater indefinitely.

rules.name: Diving Strike
rules.description: A Deep Dweller in water that is at least waist deep increases the Range of their Melee Attacks to Close.

rules.name: Watery Ambush
rules.description: A Deep Dweller and any Deep Dweller Lord accompanying them applies a +2 Modifier to the Edge Contest during a Surprise Attack at sea or where there is deep water.

rules.name: Aquatic
rules.description: A Deep Dweller Lord can remain underwater indefinitely.

rules.name: Dragged to the Depths
rules.description: A Deep Dweller Lord in or next to deep water may use 3 Actions to target a Character within Close Range. The Deep Dweller Lord and their target perform a Might Contest. If the Deep Dweller Lord wins the Contest, the target is dragged underwater to their death... unless the GM deems it suitable to allow them to be heroically saved.

jungle-dragons.name: Jungle Dragons
jungle-dragons.description: Relics of a forgotten epoch, a Jungle Dragon is a titanic creature. Spines stretch along its back, turning its already thickly scaled hide into a deadly mesh of bone.

rules.name: Tail Strike
rules.description: When a Gargantuan Jungle Dragon makes a Melee Attack with its Tail, it targets all Characters in Close Range. Make only one Attack, using the lowest Physical Defense of all targets.

frost-giants.name: Frost-Giants
frost-giants.description: Amidst the frozen tundra of the far north, strange creatures dwell. Enormous, hulking creatures bristling with icicles, the children of Ymir.

rules.name: Snow Ambush
rules.description: A Frost-Giant (and any Frost-Giant Jarl that accompanies them) applies a +3 Modifier to the Edge Contest during a Surprise Attack in any snowy or icy terrain.

rules.name: Winter's Breath
rules.description: Once per combat, a Frost-Giant Jarl may use 2 Actions to summon a wintery storm. All Characters that are not Frost-Giants or Frost-Giant Jarls may only take the Move Action once per Turn until the end of the current combat.

lesser-demons.name: Lesser Demons
lesser-demons.description: Pulled from the void between worlds, called forth by those who see in ancient grimoires a path to power. Whether Fiends or Horrors, all are deadly.

rules.name: Uncanny Strike
rules.description: A Fiend's Melee Attacks ignore their target's AR.

rules.name: Infernal Fire
rules.description: Once per Turn, a Horror may spend 6 Life Points and use 1 Action to target a single Character with the following Sorcery Attack: (Range: Long), 10 Damage.

winged-nightmares.name: Winged Nightmares
winged-nightmares.description: In the deep past of the world, great empires turned the denizens of those civilizations into the foulest of demons. These monstrosities are deathless things.

rules.name: Flight
rules.description: A Winged Nightmare can fly, ignoring all terrain and obstacles when it Moves. In addition, once per Turn, it may use 1 Action to take up to 5 Move Actions.

rules.name: Flight
rules.description: A Winged Nightmare Abomination can fly, ignoring all terrain and obstacles when it Moves. In addition, once per Turn it may use 1 Action to take up to 5 Move Actions.

rules.name: Drag Off
rules.description: If a Winged Nightmare Abomination inflicts 5 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack and it has at least 1 Action remaining, its target must pass an Edge Check (Difficulty 9) or be moved up to three Range Zones from their current location.

servants-of-ahriman.name: Servants of Ahriman
servants-of-ahriman.description: Dark is the reputation of the god Ahriman. Dark are the beings who still serve at his whims.

rules.name: Impaling Embrace
rules.description: A Servant of Ahriman may use 3 Actions to target a Character within Touch Range. The Servant of Ahriman and its target must perform a Might Contest. If the Servant of Ahriman wins, the target suffers 3D8+8 Damage.

nameless-horrors.name: Nameless Horrors
nameless-horrors.description: Beings from the vast gulfs we cannot perceive. They are usually without names. Names are human inventions; they circumscribe and contain. Beings like this are beyond such things.

rules.name: True Fear
rules.description: Non-Demon Characters within Long Range of a Nameless Horror apply a -2 Modifier to all Grit Checks.

rules.name: Fiery Rage
rules.description: Once per Turn, a Nameless Horror may use 3 Actions to target all non-Demon Characters within Range with the following Sorcery Attack: (Range: Long), 1D8+5 Damage, ignores target's AR.

wild-animals.name: Wild Animals
wild-animals.description: Out beyond the boundaries of civilization, beyond the high stone walls and the tended fields, savagery reigns. Here, life is red in tooth and claw.

rules.name: Pack Mentality
rules.description: A Hyena gains +1 to their Might Stat when there are at least three Hyenas involved in a combat.

rules.name: Pack Tactics
rules.description: When there are at least three Wolves involved in a combat, each Wolf gains one additional Move Action per Turn.

rules.name: Fire Aversion
rules.description: A Wolf applies a -1 Modifier to Attacks against targets within Close Range of fire.

rules.name: Swim
rules.description: A Crocodile can swim and hide underwater for up to an hour at a time.

rules.name: Swamp Ambush
rules.description: A Crocodile applies a +3 Modifier to the Edge Contest during a Surprise Attack in any swamp or wetland Area.

rules.name: Pin Prey
rules.description: A Lion may use 2 Actions to pin a target. The Lion and their target perform a Might Contest. If the Lion wins the Contest, the target is pinned (Immobilized) and suffers 5 Damage, ignoring AR.

rules.name: Ambush
rules.description: A Lion applies a +2 Modifier to the Edge Contest during a Surprise Attack.

rules.name: Intimidating Presence
rules.description: A Bear applies a Modifier of +2 to all Checks during a Contest.

rules.name: Ferocious Strength
rules.description: When a Bear makes a Melee Attack, reroll any results of 1 or 2 on the Damage roll.

giant-scorpions.name: Giant Scorpions
giant-scorpions.description: The tail of a Giant Scorpion drips a venom capable of eating through flesh and bone in a matter of moments.

rules.name: Poison Sting
rules.description: If a Giant Scorpion inflicts 2 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack with its Stinger, its target must pass a Grit Check (Difficulty 8) or become Poisoned.

rules.name: Poison Sting
rules.description: If a Giant Scorpion Brood Guard inflicts 2 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack with its Stinger, its target must pass a Grit Check (Difficulty 10) or become Poisoned.

actions.attackNote: Only 1 Attack may be made with Barbed Stinger each Turn

rules.name: Potent Venom
rules.description: If a Giant Scorpion Brood Mother inflicts 2 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack from its Barbed Stinger, its target must pass a Grit Check (Difficulty is equal to the number of Life Points lost from the Barbed Stinger Attack) or become Poisoned and suffer an additional 1D10 Damage, ignoring AR.

giant-spiders.name: Giant Spiders
giant-spiders.description: Far too many legs, and far too many eyes. They clamber from the darkness with preternatural agility.

rules.name: Web-Covered
rules.description: All non-Spider Characters apply a -2 Modifier to Initiative during any combat involving one or more Giant Spiders.

rules.name: Web-Shot
rules.description: Once per Turn, a Giant Spider may use 1 Action to target a single Character with the following Ranged Attack: (Range: Medium), 1D4 Damage, a target hit by this Attack may not take more than 1 Move Action during their next Turn.

rules.name: Paralyzing Venom
rules.description: When a Giant Spider Queen inflicts 3 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack, the target must pass a Grit Check (Difficulty 10) or become Immobilized until the end of their next Turn.

rules.name: Queen's Guard
rules.description: All Giant Spiders within Close Range of a Giant Spider Queen apply a Modifier of +1 to Attacks and Damage rolls.

giant-serpents.name: Giant Serpents
giant-serpents.description: It is said all human beings fear the serpent. All snakes are, in some way, the chosen of Set.

rules.name: Venomous Bite
rules.description: If a Giant Serpent inflicts 5 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack, its target becomes Poisoned.

rules.name: Constrict
rules.description: A Child of Set may use 2 Actions to constrict a target within Touch Range. The Child of Set and its target must perform a Might Contest. If the Child of Set wins, the target suffers 1D8+4 Damage and is Immobilized. At the start of the target's Turn they may pass a Might Check (Difficulty 8) to break free.

rules.name: Crushing Bite
rules.description: If a Child of Set Colossal inflicts 10 or more Damage with a single Melee Attack, its target cannot spend Stamina Points until the end of the current combat.

rules.name: Brutal Constriction
rules.description: A Child of Set Colossal may use 1 Action to constrict a target within Touch Range. The Child of Set Colossal and its target must perform a Might Contest. If the Child of Set Colossal wins, the target suffers 1D10+6 Damage and is Immobilized. At the start of the target's Turn they may pass a Might Check (Difficulty 11) to break free.

gray-man-apes.name: Gray Man-Apes
gray-man-apes.description: An atavism. A reminder of a long-lost epoch. A terrible remnant of humanity's origins.

rules.name: Climb
rules.description: A Gray Man-Ape can easily climb surfaces that most humans would consider unscalable.

rules.name: Climb
rules.description: A Gray Man-Ape Brute can easily climb surfaces that most humans would consider unscalable.

rules.name: Crushing Grapple
rules.description: If a Gray Man-Ape Brute performs two Melee Attacks during its Turn, the second Attack ignores the target's AR.

originBeast.name: Origin Beasts
originBeast.description: Beast forms available to sorcerers through the Beast Form spell. Each origin unlocks a unique transformation.

blood-of-acheron.name: Blood of Acheron
blood-of-acheron.description: Those who carry the cursed blood of ancient Acheron can channel its dark power to become something more — and less — than human.

enemies.name: The Last King
enemies.traits: Cannot cast spells or speak while transformed. Stats shown are base — actual values computed from caster's stats +2 Might, +2 Edge, +2 Grit, +2 Phys Def, +1 AR.
